TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi beforefieldinit DeploymentStackWhatIfResultProperties extends System.Object implements class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IJsonModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.DeploymentStacks.Models.DeploymentStackWhatIfResultProperties>, class System.ClientModel.Primitives.IPersistableModel`1<class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.DeploymentStacks.Models.DeploymentStackWhatIfResultProperties>
Public Class DeploymentStackWhatIfResultProperties Implements IJsonModel(Of DeploymentStackWhatIfResultProperties), IPersistableModel(Of DeploymentStackWhatIfResultProperties)

Docs.summary: DeploymentStack WhatIfResult Properties.

MemberSignature.Value: public DeploymentStackWhatIfResultProperties (Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.DeploymentStacks.Models.ActionOnUnmanage actionOnUnmanage, Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.DeploymentStacks.Models.DeploymentStackDenySettings denySettings, Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier deploymentStackResourceId, TimeSpan retentionInterval);

.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.DeploymentStacks.Models.ActionOnUnmanage actionOnUnmanage, class Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.DeploymentStacks.Models.DeploymentStackDenySettings denySettings, class Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier deploymentStackResourceId, valuetype System.TimeSpan retentionInterval) cil managed
Public Sub New (actionOnUnmanage As ActionOnUnmanage, denySettings As DeploymentStackDenySettings, deploymentStackResourceId As ResourceIdentifier, retentionInterval As TimeSpan)

Docs.param: Defines the behavior of resources that are no longer managed after the Deployment stack is updated or deleted.
Defines how resources deployed by the stack are locked.
The deployment stack id to use as the basis for comparison.
The interval to persist the deployment stack what-if result in ISO 8601 format.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of .
Defines the behavior of resources that are no longer managed after the Deployment stack is updated or deleted.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Changes As DeploymentStacksWhatIfChange

Docs.summary: All of the changes predicted by the deployment stack what-if operation.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property CorrelationId As String

Docs.summary: The correlation id of the last Deployment stack upsert or delete operation. It is in GUID format and is used for tracing.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.DebugSettingDetailLevel : string with get, set

Docs.summary: Specifies the type of information to log for debugging. The permitted values are none, requestContent, responseContent, or both requestContent and responseContent separated by a comma. The default is none. When setting this value, carefully consider the type of information that is being passed in during deployment. By logging information about the request or response, sensitive data that is retrieved through the deployment operations could potentially be exposed.
Defines how resources deployed by the stack are locked.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.DeploymentScope : string with get, set

Docs.summary: The scope at which the initial deployment should be created. If a scope is not specified, it will default to the scope of the deployment stack. Valid scopes are: management group (format: '/providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroupId}'), subscription (format: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}'), resource group (format: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}').

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property DeploymentStackLastModifiedOn As Nullable(Of DateTimeOffset)

Docs.summary: The timestamp for when the deployment stack was last modified. This can be used to determine if the what-if data is still current.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.DeploymentStackResourceId : Azure.Core.ResourceIdentifier with get, set

Docs.summary: The deployment stack id to use as the basis for comparison.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Description : string with get, set

Docs.summary: Deployment stack description. Max length of 4096 characters.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Diagnostics As IReadOnlyList(Of DeploymentStacksDiagnostic)

Docs.summary: List of resource diagnostics detected by What-If operation.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Error As ResponseError

Docs.summary: The error detail.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ExtensionConfigs As IDictionary(Of String, DeploymentExtensionConfig)

Docs.summary: The deployment extension configs. Keys of this object are extension aliases as defined in the deployment template.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ExternalInputDefinitions As IDictionary(Of String, DeploymentExternalInputDefinition)

Docs.summary: External input definitions, used by external tooling to define expected external input values.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property ExternalInputs As IDictionary(Of String, DeploymentExternalInput)

Docs.summary: External input values, used by external tooling for parameter evaluation.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property Parameters As IDictionary(Of String, DeploymentParameterItem)

Docs.summary: Name and value pairs that define the deployment parameters for the template. Use this element when providing the parameter values directly in the request, rather than linking to an existing parameter file. Use either the parametersLink property or the parameters property, but not both.
The URI of parameters file. Use this element to link to an existing parameters file. Use either the parametersLink property or the parameters property, but not both.

MemberSignature.Value: member this.Template : BinaryData with get, set

Docs.summary:
The template content. You use this element when you want to pass the template syntax directly in the request rather than link to an existing template. It can be a JObject or well-formed JSON string. Use either the templateLink property or the template property, but not both.
To assign an object to this property use .
To assign an already formatted json string to this property use .
Examples:
BinaryData.FromObjectAsJson("foo"). Creates a payload of "foo".
BinaryData.FromString("\"foo\""). Creates a payload of "foo".
BinaryData.FromObjectAsJson(new { key = "value" }). Creates a payload of { "key": "value" }.
BinaryData.FromString("{\"key\": \"value\"}"). Creates a payload of { "key": "value" }.
The URI of the template. Use either the templateLink property or the template property, but not both.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property ValidationLevel As Nullable(Of DeploymentStackValidationLevel)

Docs.summary: The validation level of the deployment stack.
